purpose: Record PR-132 C-rank recheck for remaining Australian thoroughbred state and territory coverage. This file is not a calendar input.

source_rechecks.result: Only short visible-window rows were captured. No complete official June 2026 VIC full-month source or export has been captured.
Only short visible-window rows were captured. No complete official June 2026 SA full-month source or export has been captured.
Search and route checks surfaced race-name, venue, and authority context, but did not capture a complete official June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse month table.
Search and route checks surfaced Tasmanian racing news and venue context, but did not capture a complete official June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse month table.
Search and route checks did not capture a complete official June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse month table for Northern Territory. News/event snippets and carnival context are insufficient.

Canberra Acton rows are already represented inside Racing NSW manual records. A separate ACT C-rank file is not created unless an official ACT full-month source is captured and a split policy is defined.

promotion_status.reason: Australia has promoted Queensland and NSW. Remaining VIC, SA, WA, TAS, and NT are not promoted because complete official full-month C-rank sources were not captured. ACT is already represented through Racing NSW Canberra Acton records and is not duplicated.

regeneration_method.current: Use state authority full-calendar/PDF/export routes where available. Racing Australia visible-window rows can guide search but are not sufficient for promotion.
regeneration_method.missing_for_promotion: Complete official June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows for VIC, SA, WA, TAS, and NT from state authority calendars, PDFs, exports, or accepted official monthly routes.

next_update_steps: Prioritize state authority PDFs or annual race-date exports rather than Racing Australia visible-window pages.
For VIC, inspect Racing Victoria and Country Racing Victoria race-date exports/PDFs.
For SA, inspect Racing SA race-date PDFs or monthly calendar exports.
For WA, inspect Racing WA / RWWA full-calendar or race-date exports.
For TAS, inspect Tasracing annual/monthly race-date files.
For NT, inspect Thoroughbred Racing Northern Territory, Darwin Turf Club, and Alice Springs Turf Club official race-date exports.
Do not promote partial visible-window rows, news snippets, carnival pages, or inferred normal race-day patterns as C-rank records.
